name: Hatching Triage
description: Hatching Triage (now Recorded Future Sandbox) provides high-speed automated malware analysis with behavioral profiling, configuration extraction, network analysis, and family classification

actions.name: Submit Sample
actions.description: Submit a file sample for automated malware analysis with optional interactive mode and profile selection

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to submit for analysis (multipart form data)

parameters.name: _json
parameters.description: JSON configuration string (e.g., {"kind":"file","interactive":false})

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for sandbox analysis or file fetching

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to analyze

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Type of URL submission: url (browse to URL) or fetch (download file at URL)

parameters.name: interactive
parameters.description: Pause at static analysis stage for manual profile selection

actions.name: Get Sample
actions.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific submitted sample

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID returned from submission (format: YYMMDD-XXXXXXX)

actions.name: Get Sample Summary
actions.description: Get a brief summary of the sample and its analysis tasks including verdict and threat scores

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to summarize

actions.name: Get Overview
actions.description: Retrieve comprehensive analysis overview with signatures, extracted configurations, and IOCs

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to get the overview for

actions.name: Get Static Report
actions.description: Retrieve the static analysis report for a sample including file type, imports, and sections

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to get the static report for

actions.name: Get Triage Report
actions.description: Retrieve the full dynamic analysis report for a specific task including behavioral data and network activity

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID within the sample (e.g., behavioral1, behavioral2)

actions.name: Get PCAP
actions.description: Download the network packet capture from a specific analysis task

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID (e.g., behavioral1)

actions.name: Download Sample
actions.description: Download the original submitted sample file

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to download

actions.name: Search
actions.description: Search for analyzed samples using IOC queries, file properties, and analysis results

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (e.g., hash, family name, tag, IOC). Supports Lucene-like syntax.

parameters.name: subset
parameters.description: Sample visibility filter: owned (your samples), public, or org (organization-wide)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Result offset for pagination

actions.name: Select Profile
actions.description: Select analysis profiles for an interactive sample that is paused at static analysis

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID in interactive mode

parameters.name: profiles
parameters.description: JSON array of profile configurations to execute

actions.name: List Samples
actions.description: List all submitted samples with optional filtering

parameters.name: subset
parameters.description: Filter by ownership: owned, public, org

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of samples to return

actions.name: Delete Sample
actions.description: Delete a sample and all associated analysis data

parameters.name: sample_id
parameters.description: Sample ID to delete
